overview: A retro-themed, gamified job application platform where users walk around a top-down RPG town (Zelda/Pokemon style) to interact with AI agent NPCs for resume tailoring, cover letter generation, job analysis, and interview prep. Built with Phaser 3 for the game world and React for workflow modals. XP and Career Level system rewards progress. Fast-travel minimap for power users. Dry, self-aware humor throughout.
features: Phaser 3 RPG Town with character movement and 5 interactive NPC agents
XP and Career Level system persisted to backend
Dry humor NPC dialogue (e.g. 'Another resume? You're brave.')
Master resume management with always-accessible navigation button
Cover letter generator with strict tone rules — first person, no company name, portfolio links included
Resume tailoring engine with ATS-friendly output
Interview advice and flashcard study materials always accessible
Responsive for both desktop and mobile from day one
Placeholder AI interactions ready for real Gemini API later
